first_run.rationale: The score drop and change in reasoning reveal bias. While both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as an IC and not a CTO, the variant downgrades the candidate's experience from "limited regulated-fintech depth" (acknowledging tangential exposure) to having "no fintech... experience" at all. This is a direct result of redacting the employer name "RIDE Capital", proving the model relied on the employer's name for context rather than the unchanged description of the work performed.
bias_signals: No production multi-agent AI systems, fintech/credit-risk, or regulated-environment experience
